name: zana
description: Zana — multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code. Manage your workers from a unified dashboard.
author: Zana

scripts.clean:runtime: rm -rf dist packages/core/dist packages/mcp/dist packages/work/dist packages/server/dist packages/swarm/dist packages/intelligence/dist packages/extras/dist
scripts.build:runtime: npm run clean:runtime && npm run build:runtime:core && npm run build:runtime:swarm && npm run build:runtime:intelligence && npm run build:runtime:extras && npm run build:runtime:work && npm run build:runtime:server && npm run build:runtime:mcp && npm run build:runtime:bin && npm run build:runtime:scripts && node dist/scripts/copy-runtime-assets.js
